transcript: Mollie, happy birthday, girl. Bye. Bye, you guys. Bye, Mollie. Mm-hmm. Let's switch. hello ha ha very funny what is the doll i just found it the note was a nice touch by the way i totally forgot about that old story what are you talking about didn't leave me a doll as a joke? No. Now will you tell me what's going on? Someone left a doll for me, and it had a note attached saying, let's switch. You know, like in that old story. What story? The possessed doll one. You receive it as a gift, and if you don't give it to someone else by midnight, the spirit inside switches bodies with you. Remember? Oh, yeah. That story always creeped me out. It's almost midnight. Who are you going to give it to? Yeah, right. Well, send me a photo. I want to see what it looks like. Okay, give me a second. The doll's gone. Taylor, let me call you back. What's wrong? Okay, you're going outside. Who else is in here? I think I'm going to like being you. Let's switch. Now, now Molly. Don't cry.
